# Music Marketplace

## Overview

Music Marketplace is a library of AI-generated songs created by ElevenLabs users and available for licensing across different usage types. Creators can publish songs generated with ElevenLabs, and other users can purchase usage rights to use, remix, and download those songs for their own projects.

When a song is purchased, the buyer receives a license based on the selected usage type, and the creator receives a portion of the payment as a payout.

Music Marketplace is designed to make discovering, licensing, remixing, and using music simple and straightforward.

## How licensing works

When you purchase a track on Music Marketplace, you are buying a license based on the usage type you select. This license defines where and how the music can be used.

After purchasing, you can download and remix the track an unlimited number of times while your paid ElevenLabs subscription is active. If your subscription ends, you may continue using any music you have already purchased under the respective usage type. However, you will not be able to create new remixes or downloads without an active ElevenLabs subscription.

Any derivative work (remixes) remain subject to the same usage type and licensing restrictions as the original track.

All licenses are subject to the [Music Marketplace Addendum](https://elevenlabs.io/mma).

## Usage types

When purchasing a song on Music Marketplace, you select a usage type. The selected usage type determines the license you are purchasing and defines how you can use the song and any derivative works.

### Social Media License

This license is intended for individual creators and personal content published on your own channels, including:

* Social media platforms (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, X)
* Monetized videos
* Podcasts
* Personal websites and portfolios

### Paid Marketing License

This license is designed for business and commercial use. It includes everything in the Social Media License, and also allows use in:

* Paid ads and digital marketing
* Client, freelance, or agency projects
* Commercial products and brand content

### Offline License

This license includes everything in the Paid Marketing License, and also allows use in:

* Live events and performances
* Trade shows and conferences
* Physical venues and installations
* In-store or on-location playback

### Enterprise & Custom Licensing

Some use cases are not covered by the standard usage types and require a custom agreement. This includes:

* TV, Film, Cinema and Streaming platforms (VOD / OTT)
* Large-scale commercial distribution
* Radio
* Large Studio Games

If your project involves any of the above, contact our [Enterprise Sales team](https://elevenlabs.io/enterprise) to discuss an Enterprise license and custom terms.

### Prohibited uses

The following uses are not permitted under any license:

* Distribution to music streaming platforms (Spotify, Apple Music, SoundCloud, etc.)
* Redistributing, reselling, sublicensing, or claiming ownership of the music

## Creator payouts

When a song is published, it becomes available in the Music Marketplace. Each time a user purchases a song, the creator earns a portion of the purchase amount, which is accumulated as earnings in their account.

Creators can see how many times each song has been purchased, along with their total earnings across all published songs. Earnings start at 25% of the purchase price. Applicable fees and taxes may be withheld.

Payouts are processed through the existing ElevenLabs payout system.

## FAQ

Yes, you may continue using any music you have already purchased under the respective usage
type. However, you will not be able to create new remixes or downloads without an active
ElevenLabs subscription.

Any derivative work (remixes) remain subject to the same usage type and licensing restrictions
as the original track. You cannot upgrade the usage rights of a remix beyond the original
license.

Creators earn a portion of each purchase, starting at 25% of the purchase price. Payouts are
processed through the ElevenLabs payout system.

No, distribution to music streaming platforms (Spotify, Apple Music, SoundCloud, etc.) is not
permitted under any license type.

Contact our [Enterprise Sales team](https://elevenlabs.io/enterprise) to discuss an Enterprise
license and custom terms for use cases like TV, cinema, streaming platforms, or large-scale
commercial distribution.
